message:
perf,test(resilience): add bulkhead try_acquire fast path and enhance assertions

Optimize bulkhead acquire path with early try_acquire_owned() before
queueing. When a semaphore permit is immediately available, skip the
wait queue entirely.

- Add fast-path in Bulkhead::acquire() using try_acquire_owned()
- Enhance test assertions to validate result types explicitly
- Add bulkhead_zero_queue_allows_immediate_permit test
- Fix trailing whitespace formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
